ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "char_label" TEXT /* Label of the character (e.g., 'T', 'I', 'D') */,
  "x_box" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the bounding box's top-left corner */,
  "y_box" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the bounding box's top-left corner */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the bounding box */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the bounding box */,
  "on_pix" INTEGER /* Number of pixels on the character */,
  "x_bar" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the bar (horizontal line) through the character */,
  "y_bar" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the bar (vertical line) through the character */,
  "x2_bar" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the second bar (horizontal line) through the character */,
  "y2_bar" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the second bar (vertical line) through the character */,
  "xy_bar" INTEGER /* Intersection of the X and Y bars */,
  "x2y_bar" INTEGER /* Intersection of the second X and Y bars */,
  "xy2_bar" INTEGER /* Intersection of the X and second Y bars */,
  "x_edge" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the edge */,
  "x_edge_v" INTEGER /* Vertical distance from the X edge to the top of the bounding box */,
  "y_edge" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the edge */,
  "y_edge_v" INTEGER /* Vertical distance from the Y edge to the left of the bounding box */,
  "char_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character set */,
  "writing_style" TEXT /* Writing style of the character (e.g., cursive, print) */,
  "quality_level" TEXT /* Quality level of the handwriting */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the character is from */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number within the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_char_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_set_id") REFERENCES character_sets ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the character set (e.g., 'Latin', 'Cyrillic') */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language associated with the character set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character set */,
  "script_type" TEXT /* Type of script (e.g., cursive, print) */,
  "script_style" TEXT /* Style of the script (e.g., formal, informal) */,
  "script_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the script (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., historical, legal) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character set used in the document */,
  "document_source" TEXT /* Source of the document (e.g., historical archive, personal note) */,
  "document_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the document (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "document_author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "document_location" TEXT /* Physical or digital location of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES character_sets ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_characters" (
  "doc_char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document-character mapping */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number where the character appears */,
  "position_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the character's position on the page */,
  "position_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the character's position on the page */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the character recognition */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_characters_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("anno_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_characters_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_characters_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access occurred */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "anno_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who annotated the character */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or annotation text */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the annotation (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., label, correction) */,
  "annotation_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anno_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character variant */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "variant_label" TEXT /* Label of the variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "variant_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the variant (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_variants_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., 'skew', 'kurtosis') */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., system, user) */,
  "metric_tool" TEXT /* Tool used to calculate the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_metrics_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character image */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "image_tool" TEXT /* Tool used to generate the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_images_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)
